name: postgen
description: JSON -> PNG CLI via satori + resvg

scripts.render:xhs-note: tsx src/cli.ts render --template xhs-note --data examples/xhs-note.json --stable-name --font fonts/extracted/PingFang-SC-Regular.ttf --fontBold fonts/extracted/PingFang-SC-Semibold.ttf
scripts.render:xhs-note-green: tsx src/cli.ts render --template xhs-note-green --data examples/xhs-note-green.json --stable-name --font fonts/extracted/PingFang-SC-Regular.ttf --fontBold fonts/extracted/PingFang-SC-Semibold.ttf
